channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mets nab Yankees star player in free agency
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- Juan Soto is a Met. The 15-year deal is worth $765 million and could be worth up to $805 million. Ridiculous. Mets owner Steve Cohen was always going to have the highest offer and the Yankees entered a battle where money was the ultimate factor. They were never going to win.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Salah scores 50th Champions League goal and Liverpool still perfect after 1-0 win over Girona
item.description: Mohamed Salah's 50th Champions League goal maintained Liverpool's perfect record in the competition this season with a 1-0 win over Girona on Tuesday. The Egypt forward struck a 63rd minute penalty to seal the win in Spain that kept Liverpool atop the revamped 36-team league stage.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brooks Koepka anticipates Ryder Cup vibe in LIV vs. PGA Tour match in Las Vegas
item.description: Brooks Koepka is expecting Ryder Cup vibes when LIV Golf gets to square off against PGA Tour stars in Las Vegas next week.
item.dc:creator: Doug Ferguson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Brotherly gripe? Eagles can fix any issues with one breakout passing game: Analysis
item.description: On Football analyzes the biggest topics in the NFL from week to week. For more On Football analysis, head here. ___ The Philadelphia Eagles have to make sure they don’t beat themselves. A nine-game winning streak helped the Eagles (11-2) clinch their fourth consecutive playoff berth.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vikings legend Kyle Rudolph on why it's 'really tough' to see Sam Darnold returning to Minnesota next season
item.description: Minnesota Vikings legend Kyle Rudolph loves what he's seen from Sam Darnold in his first year with the team, but he explains why it's tough to see him return.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: High school football rankings Week 16, 2024: Bay Area News Group Top 25
item.description: High school football rankings Week 16, 2024: Where teams stand before state championship games this week.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Cowboys cheerleader dating Bengals kicker Cade York has sweet reaction after successful extra point attempt
item.description: Dallas Cowboys cheerleader Zoe Dale had a sweet reaction to her boyfriend, Cincinnati Bengals kicker Cade York, after his first extra point attempt during Monday night's win.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Miami's Ward, Oregon's Gabriel, Colorado's Hunter, Boise State’s Jeanty, are named Heisman finalists
item.description: Oregon's Dillon Gabriel, Colorado's Travis Hunter, Boise State’s Ashton Jeanty, and Miami's Cam Ward were announced as the Heisman Trophy finalists on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON AP College Football Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Joe Burrow believes Bengals can keep receiver Tee Higgins, and he's willing to help
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Joe Burrow says he's willing to do whatever he can to help the Cincinnati Bengals keep receiver Tee Higgins, who is set to be a free agent in the offseason.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Silver Pigskin Finalist starts at Quarterback for Iowa Hawkeyes
item.description: Most walk-on players in college football never get the opportunity to take the field, especially not at quarterback, and certainly not for a Power Four football program like the Iowa Hawkeyes. But La Jolla alum Jackson Stratton has done just that.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Mike Tyson faces $1.5 million lawsuit over alleged contract violation in order to fight Jake Paul
item.description: Mike Tyson is being sued by a marketing company that seeks more than $1.5 million after he allegedly broke a promotional contract with them to fight Jake Paul.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Panthers promising rookie Jonathon Brooks tears ACL 3 weeks after recovering from same injury
item.description: Carolina Panthers promising rookie running back Jonathon Brooks has re-torn his right ACL, which he only fully recovered from three weeks ago, in the loss to the Philadelphia Eagles.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Falcons should 'roll the dice' and start Michael Penix Jr amid Kirk Cousins struggles, Super Bowl champ says
item.description: Atlanta Falcons quarterback Kirk Cousins is facing enormous pressure and one Super Bowl champion is calling on the team to make a change in the final few weeks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Another final-second victory puts the Chiefs in prime spot to secure AFC's No. 1 seed: Analysis
item.description: On Football analyzes the biggest topics in the NFL from week to week. For more On Football analysis, head here. ___ A thunderous doink helped the Kansas City Chiefs gain some breathing room in the race for the No.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LIV Golf star Phil Mickelson's 'random thoughts' include Daniel Penny take
item.description: Golf icon Phil Mickelson shared his "random thoughts" on Sunday night, which included a take on Daniel Penny, who is going through a trial in New York City.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CU Buffaloes & CSU Rams are bowl eligible
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— If you're struggling to remember, you're not alone. But the University of Colorado and Colorado State University are changing that narrative this year. For the first time since 2016, both Colorado schools are bowling this postseason. First up, No. 23 Colorado.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Dodgers reach $17M, 1-year deal with Conforto and $22M, 2-year contract with Treinen, AP sources say
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers agreed to a $17 million, one-year contract to add outfielder Michael Conforto and a $22 million, two-year deal to retain right-hander Blake Treinen, people familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Embiid scores 31 in his return, Maxey has his first triple-double, Sixers beat Bulls 108-100
item.description: Joel Embiid had 31 points and 12 rebounds in his return, Tyrese Maxey got his first career triple-double and the Philadelphia 76ers held on to beat the Chicago Bulls 108-100 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Allen sets NFL mark with 3 TD passes and 3 TD runs, but Stafford's Rams hold off Bills 44-42
item.description: Matthew Stafford and the Los Angeles Rams had to pile up a veritable mountain of points, yards and time-of-possession advantage early on to give themselves even a chance against the Buffalo Bills' ferocious fourth-quarter rally and a historic six-touchdown performance by Josh Allen.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Brayden Point's 4-point night leads the Lightning over the Canucks 4-2
item.description: Brayden Point scored twice and added two assists, and the Tampa Bay Lightning edged the Vancouver Canucks 4-2 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: First 12-team College Football Playoff set, Oregon seeded No. 1 and SMU edges Alabama for last spot
item.description: The tournament starts Dec. 20-21 with four first-round games involving teams seeded 5-12. It concludes Jan. 20 with the national title game in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Baltimore Orioles reach $49.5M, 3-year deal with OF Tyler O'Neill, AP source says
item.description: The Baltimore Orioles have agreed to a $49.5 million, three-year contract with outfielder Tyler O'Neill, according to a person familiar with the negotiations. The person spoke to The Associated Press on Saturday on condition of anonymity because the agreement was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tourigny wins 100th game as Utah HC beats Buffalo, 5-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Michael Kesselring had a goal and an assist for the Utah Hockey Club, which handed the Buffalo Sabres their sixth straight loss with a 5-2 win at KeyBank Center on Saturday. "It's good for the confidence," Kesselring said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dosunmu's first career triple-double leads Bulls 139-124 over Spurs
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Nikola Vucevic had a season-high 39 points, Ayo Dosunmu had 27 points, 11 assists and 10 rebounds and the Chicago Bulls beat the San Antonio Spurs 139-124 on Thursday night with Victor Wembanyama sidelined with a back injury.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah hires Jason Beck as offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - While Kyle Whittingham's future is still undecided, another former BYU player is joining the Utes coaching staff. Former BYU quarterback Jason Beck is expected to be hired as Utah's new offensive coordinator, replacing Andy Ludwig, who resigned in October.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
